Registry / Terms / performance test

performance test

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00671 · 39 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 30 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

29 distinct definitions across 39 publications. 9 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

test to verify whether the equipment under test (EUT) is able to accomplish its intended functions
